description: 5 should-trigger + 5 should-not-trigger queries. Should-trigger covers DE + EN phrasings and the four input paths (key, branch, paste, URL). Should-not-trigger covers the four near-miss neighbors (plan / estimate / duplicate / threat-model / bug-investigate) whose vocabulary overlaps with ticket refinement.

queries.q: refine this ticket before I plan it
is this ticket ready for planning?
verbessere das Ticket, ist das klar genug?
poke holes in this Jira ticket and rewrite it
plan the feature described in PROJ-123
is this feature already implemented somewhere?
threat-model the webhook endpoint in PROJ-123
investigate this bug — I think there's a Sentry issue linked
